prompt: The server fetches a user-supplied URL. What is the correct fix?

options.text: Send the request over HTTPS only
Validate the URL against an allow-list of permitted hosts/schemes and block internal/link-local IP ranges

explanation: An allow-list of hosts/schemes plus blocking internal ranges (127.0.0.0/8, 169.254.169.254, RFC1918) stops the server reaching internal targets — the correct fix for SSRF (CWE-918). Timeouts, HTTPS, and URL-encoding don't stop the request reaching an internal address.

prompt: The server fetches a user-supplied URL. What is the correct fix?

options.text: Follow only the first HTTP redirect
Validate the URL against an allow-list of permitted hosts/schemes and block internal/link-local IP ranges

explanation: An allow-list of hosts/schemes plus blocking internal ranges (127.0.0.0/8, 169.254.169.254, RFC1918) stops the server reaching internal targets — the correct fix for SSRF (CWE-918). Timeouts, HTTPS, and URL-encoding don't stop the request reaching an internal address.
